gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders; additionally, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, while consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, event staff at the entrance scan registrations and hand out lanyards, while healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, while at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and a welcome announcement outlining the fair schedule is made over the PA system, while alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; additionally, students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens; event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; additionally, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; moreover, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; furthermore, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; furthermore, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders; meanwhile, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and a welcome announcement outlining the fair schedule is made over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while students clutch resumes inside branded folders; additionally, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, while a welcome announcement outlining the fair schedule is made over the PA system, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders.
